import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { dashboardAPI, auditoriumAPI } from '../services/api'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, PieChart, Pie, Cell } from 'recharts'; import { Building2, CalendarCheck, Clock, Users, TrendingUp, CalendarDays } from 'lucide-react'; import './Dashboard.css'; const MONTHS = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec']; const STATUS_COLORS = { pending: '#f9a825', approved: '#2e7d32', rejected: '#c62828', cancelled: '#757575', completed: '#0277bd' }; export default function Dashboard() { const { user } = useAuth(); const [stats, setStats] = useState(null); const [auditoriums, setAuditoriums] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { Promise.all([dashboardAPI.getStats(), auditoriumAPI.getAll()]) .then(([s, a]) => { setStats(s.data.data); setAuditoriums(a.data.data); }) .finally(() => setLoading(false)); }, []); if (loading) return
Loading dashboard...
